message:
feat(node): safe-mode anomaly classification, SLSA level correction, and schema migration expansion

safe_mode.rs:
  - Add entry_reason_anomalies() mapping SafeModeEntryReason variants
    to AnomalyClassification values (CrashLoopDetected, EpochMismatch)
  - Add entry_reason_fallback_disposition() returning the appropriate
    DegradedDisposition (FailClosed for trust corruption, WidenUncertainty
    for crash loops and epoch mismatches)

main.rs (provenance SLSA level):
  - Correct SLSA level claim from 3 to 2 for local publish — a local
    build can prove source metadata plus a signed build artifact, but
    it cannot mint an independent source-vcs attestation chain, so
    level 3 was an overclaim regardless of source_dirty status
  - Expand registry_command_tests with explicit ChainLinkRole assertions
    verifying Publisher and BuildSystem link ordering

supply_chain/provenance.rs:
  - Supporting changes for the corrected SLSA claim chain

security/remote_cap.rs:
  - Remote capability surface updates

connector/schema_migration.rs:
  - Schema migration expansion (staged)

New/expanded integration tests:
  - tests/integration/provenance_verification_chain.rs (+26 lines)
  - tests/integration/state_migration_contract.rs (+100 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
